Touches broker, close, stop, reconcile, or position-truth behavior; requires runtime probes before change.
Legacy ORM class/export is the compatibility symbol itself; mechanical rename would be broad and risky.

Live alert/order surface: checks open positions, creates management envelopes for proposal execution, writes execution events, and gates proposals by open-sector concentration. Requires read-only parity evidence before any conversion.

Lifecycle-sensitive alpha decay path: reads live and paper evidence and may demote promoted patterns. Requires parity evidence and a dedicated behavior-preserving conversion before any ORM surface change.

Live AutoTrader exit monitor: selects open management envelopes, partitions options/crypto, seeds missing stop/target levels, submits Robinhood exits, and can trip loss kill switches. Requires runtime-object parity before any conversion.

Live AutoTrader control helper: close-now can submit broker exits, adoption/unadoption mutates management scope, and override rows feed monitor pause/synergy exclusion. Requires read-only control-scope parity evidence before any conversion.
Capital, PDT, portfolio, or fast-path risk gate; rename must wait for wider safety parity.

Live AutoTrader scale-in planner: selects open v1 management envelopes, excludes options and per-position override rows, tracks used confirming patterns, and returns additional capital/stop/target plans. Requires scale-in scope parity evidence before any conversion.

Live Autopilot ownership/scope helper: classifies open management envelopes, detects options, counts AutoTrader v1 symbol ownership, and gates new entries against momentum_neural. Requires scope/ownership parity evidence before any conversion.
Private helper surface; candidate for protocol/adapter extraction if direct tests exist.
Touches broker, close, stop, reconcile, or position-truth behavior; requires runtime probes before change.
Touches broker, close, stop, reconcile, or position-truth behavior; requires runtime probes before change.

Live action handler: critical mesh signals can be dispatched or suppressed based on local management-envelope and broker-position truth. Requires parity evidence and dedicated behavior-preserving conversion before any ORM surface change.

Learning-mutation path: closed management-envelope outcomes can write mesh mutation audit rows and, when not dry-run, mutate graph edge weights. Requires parity evidence and dedicated behavior-preserving conversion before any ORM surface change.

Reads open AutoTrader v1 management envelopes to deflect same pattern/ticker imminent candidates before alert generation. This is candidate-selection behavior, so conversion requires explicit deflection-scope parity before any runtime row-source change.

Live pattern-position monitor: selects open management envelopes, filters broker-stale rows, writes PatternMonitorDecision evidence, can tighten stored stop/target levels, and emits exit/tighten alerts. Requires selection and runtime-object parity before conversion.
